## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Related issue

Link an issue when applicable.

## Validation

List the commands and focused cases used to verify the change.

## Format and API impact

Describe any public API, metadata, binary layout, CRC, Huffman, or DLL-parity impact. Write “None” when it does not apply.

## Checklist

- [ ] I performed a self-review and kept the change focused.
- [ ] I added or updated tests for behavior changes and malformed-input boundaries.
- [ ] `bun run validate` passes with 100% coverage.
- [ ] I updated public or format documentation where needed.
- [ ] I preserved browser compatibility in `src/`.
- [ ] I did not add proprietary database contents or generated artifacts.
- [ ] My commits follow Conventional Commits.
